title: バブリーランドいらっしゃいませ

text_block_list.text:
Bubblyland is an eccentric pool resort themed around the fun
atmosphere of Japan's late '80s bubble era.

Here, everyone liberates themselves in their desire to experience the
passion and brilliance of the good ol' days and a taste of the
extraordinary.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There's podiums to dance on, tiramisu and nata de coco at the cafe,
mochi by the pool, and a giant waterslide to enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You can rent retro clothes over there?! Awesome!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow! Look at those cars! Their bodies are set so low to the ground!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: No, hang on! This isn't a training facility at all!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Wait... Don't tell me you tricked me into coming here?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you! There's no way I would do such a thing to my cute little
junior! It's true that this place can help turn your bad vibes into good
ones!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Just let yourself get carried away by the party fever, and you'll
understand soon enough! Anyway, let's change into our swimsuits!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa! W-wait a second!
Meanwhile, on Daiwa Scarlet's side of things...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Uuuugh! Where's all the magic?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Calm down a little! Ugh, how did I even get dragged into this?!
For some reason, she ended up at Bubblyland too.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll do two laps around the track this morning... No, I'll do four! I don't care what it takes—I will get back to normal by this weekend!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? Isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Spe and Tickezo, you two'd better hold on tight! You're gonna
experience the most amazing magic at Bubblyland!

text_block_list.name: Spe and Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okaaay!
Vrooom...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Bubblyland... Oh, that's the place Maruzen invited me to yesterday. I
hope Spe can get some good training in there...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Magic?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Did she say magic?! I just heard something about the most amazing
magic! They all looked so excited, it's got to be magic!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: She did say that, but it's just a—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to that Bubbly whatchamacallit place too! No one can stop
me!
Sweep Tosho runs as fast as she can after the rental car.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wait, is she seriously planning on running there?! You've got to be kidding!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(Oh my gosh, she's running at full tilt... Wait, does she even know how
to get to that place? If she loses sight of the car, she'll be completely
lost...)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Uuugh! Hang on, Sweep! Wait up!

One thing leads to another, and Daiwa Scarlet ends up chasing
Sweep Tosho all the way to Bubblyland.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I never expected we'd have to go over three mountains. That was more intense than any training session! ...But that's not important!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Sweep. Listen to me carefully. The whole "magical land" thing
was just a metaphor. Magic doesn't really exist.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It does too! My grandma's able to use it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: N-no, that's not what I—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
There's definitely magic here! If you don't believe me, then I'll just
have to find it and prove you wrooong!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Aah! Wait! Aw, I was planning to take her straight home once I caught
up to her!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe I should just leave, and—no, I can't! An honor student can't
just abandon someone who chased after a car all this way!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... Ugh, come on!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: This is ridiculous! I have to hurry back and train!
